MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT ONE RINCON DEVELOPMENT, L L C'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED; DEFENDANT'S MOTION DOES NOT SEEK TO ADJUDICATE AN ENTIRE DUTY OR CAUSE OF ACTION; PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT SEEKS PAYMENT OF A COMMISSION; DEFENDANT'S MOTION, AT MOST, WOULD ADJUDICATE ONE PART OF THE COMMISSION PLAINTIFF SEEKS. Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Set For Trial On Apr-26-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-08-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 613

Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Marisa Kirschenbauer, Esq. of Luce, Forward, Hamilton & Scripps LLP, 415-356-4600 for defendant and moving party One Rincon Development, LLC
Thomas LaLanne, Esq., 415-434-1122 for plaintiff and opposing party John Kirkpatrick

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIED DEFENDANT ONE RINCON DEVELOPMENT, LLC'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration ON THE GROUNDS THAT A DISPUTE BETWEEN THE SELLER AND BROKER NOT ENVOLVING THE PURCHASER IS NOT WITHIN THE SCOPE OF WHAT THE BROKER AGREED TO ARBITRATE BY HAVING AGREED TO THE TERMS OF THE CONDOMINIUM DEPOSIT RECEIPT AND AGREEMENT OF SALE. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
